title: Taking care of your teeth and mouth - Canada.ca
content:
## Taking care of your teeth and mouth
Proper teeth cleaning for infants, children, adults, seniors and pregnant people.
Applications are open
The Canadian  Dental Care Plan (CDCP) is helping make the cost of dental care more  affordable for eligible Canadian residents.
Canadians of all ages can now apply for the CDCP.

## Services and information

### Oral health for infants and children
Early childhood tooth decay, prevent tooth decay, mouth care, baby teeth, adult teeth

### Oral health for adults
Adult teeth and mouth, gingivitis, periodontitis, oral health plan, wisdom teeth

### Oral health for seniors
Dry mouth, denture care, tooth decay, toothbrush alterations

### Oral health and pregnancy
Morning sickness and tooth decay, healthy diet, health risks, substance use, bleeding gums
- Public Health Agency of Canada
